title: WA4 6YZ, 3C Waste Limited: permit partial surrender issued - EPR/BS7668IH/S012
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit for:   Operator name: 3C Waste Limited Installation name: Arpley Landfill Site Permit number: EPR/BS7668IH/S012  "
